title: Daily Bread Food Bank says ship carrying $90K worth of food destined for Toronto was ‘hit’ in the Strait of Hormuz

paragraphs.english: Sections GTHA Weather CP24 App CP24 Now Watch Contests CP24 Breakfast In Pictures Sign In Sign In Download Our App Local Toronto Peel Hamilton Durham York Halton Niagara Politics Queen's Park Toronto City Hall CP24 Now In Pictures Video Live CP24 Breakfast Live at Five Ask a Lawyer Hot Property Know Your Rights Taking Stock Weather Traffic Canada Sports World Entertainment Money Contests Contact Us Newsletters CTV News Opens in new window BNN Bloomberg Opens in new window Toronto Daily Bread Food Bank says ship carrying $90K worth of food destined for Toronto was ‘hit’ in the Strait of Hormuz By Laura Sebben Opens in new window Updated: March 11, 2026 at 7:04PM EDT
paragraphs.pidgin: Sections GTHA Weather CP24 App CP24 Now Watch Contests CP24 Breakfast For Pictures Sign For Sign For Download Our App Local Toronto Peel Hamilton Durham York Halton Niagara Politics Queen im Park Toronto City Hall CP24 Now For Pictures Video Live CP24 Breakfast Live for Five Ask a Lawyer Hot Property Know Your Rights Taking Stock Weather Traffic Canada Sports World Entertainment Money Contests Contact Us Newsletters CTV News Opens for new window BNN Bloomberg Opens for new window Toronto Daily Bread Food Bank tok ship carrying $90K worth of food destined for Toronto bin ‘hit’ for di Strait of Hormuz By Laura Sebben Opens for new window Updated: March 11, 2026 for 7:04PM EDT

paragraphs.english: The CEO of Daily Bread Food Bank says products destined for the Toronto organization were on cargo ships that were attacked in the Strait of Hormuz near Iran.
paragraphs.pidgin: Di CEO of Daily Bread Food Bank tok products destined for di Toronto organization bin dey on cargo ships dat bin dey attacked for di Strait of Hormuz near Iran.

paragraphs.english: According to the U.K. Maritime Trade Operations Centre, three cargo ships were struck by some kind of projectile while passing through the strait on Wednesday. One was identified as a Thai-flagged vessel with 23 crew members on board.
paragraphs.pidgin: as di U.K. Maritime Trade Operations Centre, three cargo ships bin dey struck by some kind of projectile while passing through di strait on Wednesday. One bin identified as a Thai-flagged vessel wit 23 crew members on board.

paragraphs.english: In an interview with CTV News Toronto on Wednesday, Daily Bread Food Bank CEO Neil Hetherington claimed that one of those three ships was carrying food that was intended for the Toronto-based organization.
paragraphs.pidgin: For an interview wit CTV News Toronto on Wednesday, Daily Bread Food Bank CEO Neil Hetherington claim tok one of dem ones three ships bin dey carrye food dat bin intended for di Toronto-based organization.

paragraphs.english: “Right now, we are purchasing dozens of containers with rice primarily,” Hetherington explained. “I don’t know the number of containers, but it would probably be in the neighbourhood of a half dozen containers. You think about that, and you think about the number of meals that would have provided for for the City of Toronto.”
paragraphs.pidgin: “now now, we dey purchase dozens of containers wit rice primarily,” Hetherington explained. “I don’t know di number of containers, but e go probably be for di neighbourhood of a half dozen containers. You think about dat, and you think about di number of meals dat go don provided for for di City of Toronto.”

paragraphs.english: “Our concern, obviously, is with the sailors that are (in the strait). And then we also want to make sure that the individuals who are supposed to get that food, get it. So, we have some redundancy plans in place so that every single person who was promised a meal by the Daily Bread will get that meal.”
paragraphs.pidgin: “Our concern, obviously, na wit di sailors dat dey (for di strait). And then we also want to make sure dat di individuals who dey supposed to get dat food, get e. So, we get some redundancy plans for place so dat every single person who bin promised a meal by di Daily Bread go get dat meal.”

paragraphs.english: Hetherington added that each container they order costs the food bank about $15,000, so he believes they lost about $90,000 worth of product.
paragraphs.pidgin: Hetherington also tok tok each container dem order costs di food bank about $15,000, so im believes dem lose about $90,000 worth of product.

paragraphs.english: “Our hope is that it was one of the ships that has not actually gone down, but there was a fire on it instead,” he said.
paragraphs.pidgin: “Our hope na dat e bin na one of di ships dat get no actually go down, but e dey a fire on e instead,” im tok.

paragraphs.english: “So, perhaps there aren’t losses, but rather delays. But, a delay means a meal not on the table of somebody that needs it. Our hope is that the sailors are safe and that the food gets to the individuals, and if there are financial losses, we’ll need to absorb that. But in general, we’ve got these things insured.”
paragraphs.pidgin: “So, maybe there aren’t losses, but rather delays. But, a delay means a meal no on di table of somebody dat needs e. Our hope na dat di sailors dey safe and dat di food gets to di individuals, and if e dey financial losses, we’ll need to absorb dat. But for general, we’ve get dis ones things insured.”

paragraphs.english: Iran has effectively stopped cargo traffic through the narrow Strait of Hormuz, through which a fifth of all traded oil passes.
paragraphs.pidgin: Iran get effectively stop cargo traffic through di narrow Strait of Hormuz, through which a fifth of all traded oil passes.

paragraphs.english: At least 12 incidents have been confirmed involving vessels in and around the strait since the Iran war began, according to two global trackers.
paragraphs.pidgin: For least 12 incidents don dey confirm involving vessels for and around di strait since di Iran war start, as two global trackers.

paragraphs.english: The International Maritime Organization says at least seven mariners have been killed.
paragraphs.pidgin: Di International Maritime Organization tok for least seven mariners don dey kill.

paragraphs.english: With files from CTV News Toronto’s Natalie Johnson and The Associated Press
paragraphs.pidgin: Wit files from CTV News Toronto’s Natalie Johnson and Di Associated Press
